name: A.T.A.G. Cannon
description: A cannon that can be equipped on the left hand of an A.T.A.G. It fires a cannon shot that flies straight ahead.

name: A.T.A.G. Fist
description: A fist that can be equipped on both hands of an A.T.A.G. It knocks foes down with heavy blows.

name: A.T.A.G. Flamespitter
description: A flamespitter that can be equipped on the right hand of an A.T.A.G. It spews flames that swallow everything.

name: A.T.A.G. Laser
description: Laser that can be equipped on the left hand of an A.T.A.G. The temperatures that this laser can reach are hotter that fire itself.

name: A.T.A.G. Machine Gun
description: A machine gun that can be equipped on the right hand of an A.T.A.G. Its rapid-fire makes it well-suited to dealing with multiple enemies.

name: A.T.A.G. Pincers
description: A repairing claw that can be equipped on the right hand of an A.T.A.G. Used for holding firmly onto something.

name: A.T.A.G. Welder
description: A welder that can be equipped on the right hand of an A.T.A.G. Used to weld metal parts together.

name: Absolute Justice Greatsword
description: A folding greatsword made by House Spencer. Rumors say a last survivor of the exterminated House Spencer remains. If true, she would surely be fighting bravely for Demeniss's justice. Built with a special mechanism, the blade can be folded for carrying when not in use.

name: Acorn Mace
description: A mace shaped like an acorn. If you get struck with this, you'll end up with more than just an acorn-sized lump.

name: Acria Sword
description: A mysterious curved sword imbued with a radiant golden glow. Much like the history of the Crimson Desert, shrouded in mystery to outsiders, this weapon is equally enigmatic. Its ornate patterns and bizarre embellishments suggest the blade was forged for ritualistic purposes.

name: Aeserion Bow
description: A bow made with the scales of Aeserion, the Great Serpent. The scales used for this weapon are imbued with a power not of this world. The benevolent god bestowed wisdom upon people in the distant past, and today, he has even offered scales containing his power. This is because he loves the inhabitants of Pywel more than anything else.

name: Aeserion Dagger
description: A dagger made with the scales of Aeserion, the Great Serpent. The scales used for this weapon are imbued with a power not of this world. The benevolent god bestowed wisdom upon people in the distant past, and today, he has even offered scales containing his power. This is because he loves the inhabitants of Pywel more than anything else.

name: Aeserion Greataxe
description: A greataxe made with the scales of Aeserion, the Great Serpent. The scales used for this weapon are imbued with a power not of this world. The benevolent god bestowed wisdom upon people in the distant past, and today, he has even offered scales containing his power. This is because he loves the inhabitants of Pywel more than anything else.

name: Aeserion Greathammer
description: A greathammer with from the scales of Aeserion, the Great Serpent. The scales used for this weapon are imbued with a power not of this world. The benevolent god bestowed wisdom upon people in the distant past, and today, he has even offered scales containing his power. This is because he loves the inhabitants of Pywel more than anything else.

name: Aeserion Halberd
description: A halberd made with the scales of Aeserion, the Great Serpent. The scales used for this weapon are imbued with a power not of this world. The benevolent god bestowed wisdom upon people in the distant past, and today, he has even offered scales containing his power. This is because he loves the inhabitants of Pywel more than anything else.

name: Aeserion Longsword
description: A sword made with the scales of Aeserion, the Great Serpent. The scales used for this weapon are imbued with a power not of this world. The benevolent god bestowed wisdom upon people in the distant past, and today, he has even offered scales containing his power. This is because he loves the inhabitants of Pywel more than anything else.

name: Aeserion Mace
description: A mace made with the scales of Aeserion, the Great Serpent. The scales used for this weapon are imbued with a power not of this world. The benevolent god bestowed wisdom upon people in the distant past, and today, he has even offered scales containing his power. This is because he loves the inhabitants of Pywel more than anything else.

name: Aeserion Spear
description: A spear made with the scales of Aeserion, the Great Serpent. The scales used for this weapon are imbued with a power not of this world. The benevolent god bestowed wisdom upon people in the distant past, and today, he has even offered scales containing his power. This is because he loves the inhabitants of Pywel more than anything else.

name: Aeserion Sword
description: A sword made with the scales of Aeserion, the Great Serpent. The scales used for this weapon are imbued with a power not of this world. The benevolent god bestowed wisdom upon people in the distant past, and today, he has even offered scales containing his power. This is because he loves the inhabitants of Pywel more than anything else.

name: Aeserion Warhammer
description: A warhammer made with the scales of Aeserion, the Great Serpent. The scales used for this weapon are imbued with a power not of this world. The benevolent god bestowed wisdom upon people in the distant past, and today, he has even offered scales containing his power. This is because he loves the inhabitants of Pywel more than anything else.

name: Air Blaster
description: A blaster that can compress and fire air. The compressed air unleashes a powerful blast of pressure, sending enemies flying on contact.

name: Alabaster Curved Sword
description: A sword named after the bridge to Varnia. The Alabaster Bridge is the only road linking Varnia to Pywel, making it the symbol of Varnia's trade.

name: Alabaster Dagger
description: A dagger named after the bridge to Varnia. After many dangers in the Crimson Desert, seeing the Alabaster Bridge means your journey is almost over.

name: Alabaster Halberd
description: A halberd named after the bridge to Varnia. Its long axe blade is crafted to both stab and slash. Outlaws that swarm the desert never dare cross the Alabaster Bridge, which stands as both Varnia's welcome to visitors and border of civilization from barbarism.

name: Alabaster Mace
description: A mace named after the bridge to Varnia. Each day, pilgrims cross the Alabaster Bridge to reach Whitesand Retreat, a gateway to enlightenment.

name: Alabaster Spear
description: A spear named after the bridge to Varnia. Throughout the city's long history, it has never fallen to invaders. Guards proudly patrol it, maintaining the city's peace.

name: Alfonso Spear
description: A spear specially commissioned to the blacksmith of Hernand by House Alfonso, masters of the spear. It has a razor-sharp spearhead, with a secondary blade behind it shaped like the sun.

name: Alpha Barrel Cannon
description: A cannon crafted by Gorthak orcs. While its appearance follows a traditional form, it is equipped with a modernized firing mechanism. Even if it may not be the most impressive among the weapons created by the Ironflame Orcs, the quality is reliable due to the superior iron they use.

name: Ancient Wood Pole
description: A spear carved from ancient wood. If one knows the right crafting techniques, some old trees of Pywel can be made as strong as steel.

name: Anti-Caliburn Signboard
description: A signboard showing opposition to Caliburn. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Antumbra's Eye
description: A staff used by the high priests of the Antumbra Order. When held by one who wields the power of darkness, it amplifies that power.

name: Arben Greatsword
description: A folding greatsword made by House Spencer. As the house faded into history, the arms it created scattered across Pywel through countless channels. Built with a special mechanism, the blade can be folded for carrying when not in use.

name: Arlem Warhammer
description: A shoddy warhammer, imitating Arlen weaponry. They say it's not just some common scheme to make a quick coin. Rumor has it there's something far more sinister at play.

name: Arlen Musket
description: One of the signature muskets of Demeniss. It embodies a long history and craftsmanship, yet its reliability has recently been called into question. Rumor has it this is a smear meant to tarnish the house's honor, and in practice its performance remains solid.

name: Arlen Warhammer
description: A warhammer crafted in Demeniss. There are rumors it was modeled after an old Demenissian royal scepter, though the scepter has been missing for so long that the authenticity of the rumors cannot be verified.

name: Artisan's Hand
description: A mace said to have been made in the likeness of Marni's own hand. Though his actions and inventions baffle many, Delesyians accept his eccentricities, trusting results over reason.

name: Ashen Execution
description: A warhammer once used by Tarandus the Ashen. Crafted to fit Tarandus's grip, it is refined yet built to swing with brutal force. The hammer head has a narrow striking face to focus its impact, while the other side is a spike sharp enough to punch through armor.

name: Ator's Finger
description: A weapon shrouded in a grim aura. The followers of Umbra believe that weapons forged from the essence of Umbra, the darkness itself, are instruments of righteousness. Yet, they remain unaware that the blade's edge could one day turn against them.

name: Awakened Spirit
description: A halberd once wielded by the Forgotten General. It seems designed to knock foes down with its sharp spearhead, then finish them off with its crescent blade. It carries the general's resolve to remain behind, even as a spirit, to protect Odeck.

name: Balton Hammer
description: A hammer named after the apprentice knight, Balton. His courage in the face of injustice serves as an inspiration to the people of Calphade. It was crafted in the likeness of the hammer Balton used to strike the warning bell just before he died.

name: Balton Longsword
description: A mass-produced longsword named after the apprentice knight, Balton. While Balton was just one of many apprentices, his exceptional talent had caught even Stefan Lanford's eye. To honor Balton, who gave up his life to fulfill his duty, Calphade bestowed his name upon this weapon.

name: Balton Mace
description: A club named after the apprentice knight, Balton. His courage in the face of injustice serves as an inspiration to the people of Calphade. It is said that Balton only wielded this mace when delivering judgment upon evil.

name: Bamboo Spear
description: A sharp spear crafted from sturdy bamboo. Made from bamboo, durability is not its strongest suit, but it looks deadly enough.

name: Beehive Club
description: A club with a beehive impaled on a stick. Bees sleep inside the hive, and when an enemy is struck, they awaken and swarm out.

name: Bekker Axe
description: A worn axe named after Bekker, the miserly warrior. "There's an old tale, passed down through the ages—the story of Bekker, the miserly warrior."

name: Bekker Bow
description: A worn bow named after the miserly warrior, Bekker. "Bekker lost his life when his sword broke, yet his name still lives on in the tales of the poor."

name: Bekker Dagger
description: A worn dagger named after the miserly warrior, Bekker. "Whenever Bekker marched to the battlefield, a battered old weapon was ever in his grasp."

name: Bekker Greataxe
description: A worn greataxe named after the miserly warrior, Bekker. "Yet in Bekker's heart, there was a deeper meaning unknown to others."

name: Bekker Greathammer
description: A worn greathammer named after the miserly warrior, Bekker. "Many were able to feel the touch of salvation thanks to Bekker's help."

name: Bekker Halberd
description: A worn halberd named after the miserly warrior, Bekker. "Yet, despite his righteous intent, fate saw fit to test Bekker most cruelly."

name: Bekker Hammer
description: A worn hammer named after the miserly warrior, Bekker. "Mockery hounded Bekker, the miserly warrior, wherever he went. Scorn was clinging to his every step."

name: Bekker Musket
description: A worn musket named after the miserly warrior, Bekker. "His swordsmanship was extraordinary, but it was his worn blade that betrayed him in the end."

name: Bekker Warhammer
description: A worn warhammer named after the miserly warrior, Bekker. "Bekker used the money he had scrimped and saved to aid the poor."

name: Bismuth Cannon
description: A cannon clad in bismuth. An ominous energy lingers within it. Bismuth itself is dangerous when handled recklessly, but the greater threat is likely the malice of the Antumbra zealots who forged it, which has seeped into the weapon.

name: Bismuth Spear
description: A spear made from bismuth ore. When struck, crystals grow through the victim's veins, turning the body rigid as stone and greatly slowing movement. A brief recharge time is required after an attack.

name: Black Bears Banner Pike with Tassel
description: A Black Bears' banner pike with a tassel attached to it. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Black Iron Axe
description: An axe featuring an imposing black blade. Blacksmiths of old believed that forging weapons with black blades would allow the wielder to absorb the souls of fallen enemies. While the era of such superstition has passed, the tradition of crafting weapons from black iron remains.

name: Blaster No. 8
description: A blaster crafted using parts of the Golden Star. Beneath Delesyia's signature ornate embellishments lies an internal mechanism far more complex than any would ever expect.

name: Blazing Spear
description: A spear that spits fire. Designed by an engineer inspired by fire-breathing dragons. Not merely a weapon for stabbing a single foe, but forged to face many at once.

name: Bleed Shotgun
description: A shotgun crafted by a technician of the Bleed Bandits. When Walter Lanford, the leader of them, ordered a flashy yet highly lethal shotgun, this prototype was hastily crafted. Though not exceptional, its performance was good enough to spare the technician from Walter's temper.

name: Bloodsteel Bow
description: A bow crafted by the Blinding Arrows. After building the Bloodsteel Camp, the Blinding Arrows rapidly expanded their influence. They sought to seize Wells with their own hands.

name: Bonepit Greataxe
description: A greataxe used in the Bonepit. It is made for the one purpose of ending the life of whoever stands against its wielder. Tommaso was always ruled by brute force, but Muskan didn't just help it thrive—he helped drive it into lawlessness.

name: Bonepit Greathammer
description: A greathammer used in the Bonepit. Its head is crafted from a single, solid piece of shaped rock. While The Bonepit technically has its own rules, the crowd only cheers louder when an opponent "accidentally" dies.

name: Bonepit Halberd
description: A halberd used in the Bonepit. A practical halberd with a single large axe blade and no ornamentation. No one knows how many more bones will pile up in the Bonepit.

name: Bonepit Mace
description: A mace forged in the Bonepit. Muskan of the Bonepit was the infamous master, executioner, and champion of the renowned arena.

name: Bonepit Warhammer
description: A warhammer used in the Bonepit. The champion Muskan had a grisly hobby of piling up his victims' bones, which gave the arena its chilling name of "The Bonepit."

name: Bow of the Fleeting
description: A bow wielded by the earthen archers of Hexe Sanctuary. Though they have neither eyes nor ears, they always find their targets, guided by a dark desire to extinguish life.

name: Brass Rose Rapier
description: A Demenissian weapon in Delesyian style. Though Delesyia's advanced technology drew a sense of alert from other factions, such as Demeniss, their alluring innovations were sought through either diplomacy or force.

name: Bringer of Balance
description: A staff once used by Master Du. The chimes hanging from the end of the handle seem meant to keep it balanced. It looks dull, but it holds tremendous power and durability.

name: Cactus Warhammer
description: A warhammer shaped like a thorny cactus. The bandits of the Crimson Desert range from brutal thugs with such crude weapons to groups with finer arms. But they are all villains who prey on the weak.

name: Caliburn's Mercy Pistol
description: A pistol once used by Caliburn. One by one, he bestowed the merciful tolerance of death upon those who stood in his path for the greater cause. He had a grand plan for the future of all of Pywel, beyond Demeniss.

name: Calphadean Contribution Banner Pike
description: A ceremonial banner crafted by the artisans of Calphade. It features a banner woven onto the end of a long, sturdy pike. Only those who have contributed to Hernand are permitted to possess it.

name: Celeste Halberd
description: A halberd specially crafted on Duke Celeste's orders. It features a long, slender spearhead in teal and a heavy axe blade. Even in hardship, not many speak ill of Hernand's duke and marquis. A leader who earns the people's trust holds an honor beyond price.

name: Ceremonial Warhammer
description: A special staff used in desert rituals and rites. It is believed that walking the desert in prayer with a devout heart will imbue it with sacred power. Whether it truly holds such power is unknown, but it is well-suited for self-defense.

name: Chillfallen Sword
description: A pure white blade radiating an eerie power. This weapon was forged using a refinement process unlike any other. Every swing seems to echo with the howl of a beast.

name: Circling Moon
description: A spear once wielded by the Full Moon Reaper of the Lunar Reapers. Its short spearhead juts out, and behind it sits a circular ring-shaped blade that allows natural transition between slashing and stabbing.

name: Cog Destroyer Spear
description: A spear commonly used in Delesyia. This spear's long spike is made to slip between cogs or into tight gaps, ideal for those unable to pierce a machine's iron with force.

name: Competition Musket
description: A musket used for matches. Designed to prevent the use of large amounts of gunpowder, its lethality is low. It is used for entertainment purposes only, such as village festivals or sparring.

name: Competition Spear
description: A spear used for matches. Its blade is left unsharpened, reducing its lethality. It is used for entertainment purposes only, such as village festivals or sparring.

name: Competition Sword
description: A sword used for matches. Its blade is left unsharpened, reducing its lethality. It is used for entertainment purposes only, such as village festivals or sparring.

name: Competition Wooden Bow
description: A bow used for matches. Made from low-spring wood, it has little lethal potential. It is used for entertainment purposes only, such as village festivals or sparring.

name: Copper Knuckledrill
description: A drill weapon.

name: Crimson Warden's Bow
description: The Crimson Warden's bow. While fundamentally a Greymane-style bow, it was modified by reinforcing the shaft with payment received from Bastier as the price of betrayal. It was designed to suppress approaching enemies from long range for a master who seeks comfort over honor.

name: Crow Brothers Axe
description: An axe wielded by the Crow Brothers. They swear blind loyalty to their leader, Draven, honing their assassination skills to become his faithful weapon. Hesitation is not forgiven.

name: Crow Brothers Dagger
description: The Crow Brothers dagger. Each member is loyal to the brotherhood for their own reasons: Hatred for Solumena, blind worship of darkness, or the fact that the Crow Nest is their only home.

name: Crow Brothers Warhammer
description: A warhammer used by the Crow Brothers. Both ends of the weapon are adorned with crow-shaped ornaments. The Crow Brothers wield a faint yet kindred power bequeathed by Draven. However, with that power came his madness and hatred as well.

name: Crow Whisperer
description: A staff blending delicate craftsmanship with sophisticated magic. It retains a gentle power that refused to be tainted by darkness—a force even the Black Witch could not corrupt. Much like this staff, where the contradictory powers of Light and Darkness coexist, the true essence of that being may have been a shade of gray before it was split apart.

name: Crude Club
description: A club crudely cobbled together from splintered wood. To survive the treacherous Pywel, one must craft and use even such crude weapon.

name: Dagger of Dark Pursuit
description: A dagger forged with a bismuth alloy. Refined by the hands of a master blacksmith, the ore's toxic impurities have been meticulously purged. The blade retains bismuth's signature crystalline patterns, casting a mysterious and otherworldly aura.

name: Damaged Medium Calphadean Banner Pike
description: A damaged medium banner pike bearing Calphade's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Dandelion Longsword
description: A longsword forged by a blacksmith named Dandelion. It is made using his own specially developed steel ingots, with a fancy ornament on the end of the handle.

name: Dane Shotgun
description: The shotgun used by Walter Lanford, the leader of the Bleed Bandits. The red barrel and golden axe blade blend together, giving an impression that is beyond luxurious and even extravagant. Walter, who could not fire a bow at a decisive moment, changed his weapon to a shotgun so as to not repeat mistakes.

name: Dark Worshiper's Staff
description: A staff used by the priests of the Antumbra Order. Antumbra followers see the Dark Deacons' reaping as a passage through darkness. Not an end, but a rebirth beyond this world's imperfections.

name: Darkbringer
description: A longsword once wielded by the Archon of Antumbra. A blade that leads those who pursue the darkness into it. It responds to the darkness within whoever holds it, whispering to surrender to it.

name: Dekarr Bow
description: A bow forged in a traditional Odeck style. Once famed under the protection of the Forgotten General and the witch, Odeck is now a quiet border town.

name: Dekarr Dagger
description: A dagger crafted in the traditional Odeck style. Dekarr is said to be the ancient name for Odeck. During the height of Odeck's power, daggers crafted here spread far and wide across the surrounding regions.

name: Dekarr Greataxe
description: A greataxe forged in a traditional Odeck style. Its plain wooden haft contrasts with an axehead etched in ornate patterns. The vast lake before the village is known as Pywel's lifeblood. Many civilizations have risen and fallen along its waters, but few have endured as long as Odeck.

name: Dekarr Hammer
description: A hammer in traditional Odeck style. The ruins surrounding Odeck are often cited as evidence for the claim that the origins of the Pailunese people, including those of Odeck, are fundamentally different from those of other peoples of Pywel. This is only the view of certain scholars.

name: Dekarr Sword
description: A traditional sword forged to emulate the martial prowess of the Forgotten General, the guardian of Odeck. While little remains of her legacy beyond her fame and techniques, legends tells of her spear, still resting somewhere within the deep valleys of Odeck.

name: Delesyian Contribution Banner Pike
description: A banner pike embroidered with the pattern representing Delesyia. It is lashed to a long shaft, allowing it to be used as a weapon. Only those who have contributed to Delesyia are permitted to possess it.

name: Delesyian Dagger
description: A dagger crafted in Delesyia. After machinists sparked a mechanical revolution, hand-to-hand weapons saw less use in Delesyia. Still, a small and sturdy dagger can prove its worth in urgent moments.

name: Delesyian Longsword
description: A longsword defined by its hook-like blade. It is usually used to cut down foes, but the hooked section can also be used to restrain the movements of larger enemies.

name: Delesyian Musket
description: A musket mass produced using Delesyia's automated facilities. Built by machines without human hands, it's supplied in huge numbers and has spread beyond the homeland into nearby regions. It looks ordinary, but its standardized production process ensures consistent performance.

name: Delesyian Shotgun
description: A shotgun mass-produced in Delesyia's automated facilities. Built by machines without human hands, it is supplied in huge numbers and has spread throughout nearby regions. Plain in appearance, it delivers consistent performance thanks to standardized production.

name: Delonde Axe
description: A nimble axe capable of fast, consecutive attacks. Its flexibility in complex combat situations makes it popular among those with some weapon experience.

name: Demenissian Chainsaw
description: A logging tool that drastically boosts speed. It enables logging at a pace incomparable to a standard axe. Not satisfied with this, the artisan designed the system so that timber is automatically collected through the saw blade simultaneously with logging.

name: Demenissian Contribution Banner Pike
description: An ornate banner emblazoned with the crest of Demeniss. The flag is woven onto the end of a long pike. Only those who have contributed to Demeniss are permitted to possess it.

name: Demenissian Hero's Musket
description: A masterwork musket that was bestowed upon the hero who saved Demeniss. Precisely crafted with the finest skills, it boasts overwhelming performance. The Demeniss of today was not built in a day, and this weapon is a treasure symbolizing the kingdom's numerous victories. Its value is beyond measure.

name: Derictus Spear
description: A spear forged in a far land beyond even guesswork. Its silver blade pierces enemies with ruthless sharpness. A bow and armor once formed a set with it - yet their whereabouts remain unknown.

name: Desert Hammer
description: A hammer that has shattered countless skulls. It boasts immense destructive power and durability. Designed by the renowned artisans of Crimson Desert, it maintains its form even in extreme environments like the desert.

name: Dewhaven Longsword
description: A longsword forged at Dewhaven Keep. This sword was once Dewhaven's pride before the Age of Machines, but they now are mostly symbolic. Nevertheless, Faust still favors such weapons wielded by human hands.

name: Dewhaven Shotgun
description: A shotgun with a simple appearance. However, unlike the plain exterior, it was elaborately crafted with sturdy parts. While the technicians of Dewhaven are not uninterested in decorating the appearance of weapons, they prioritize practicality above all else.

name: Disruptor Spear
description: A spear crafted to prevent machines from overloading and going haywire. Swinging it unleashes an electromagnetic pulse that disrupts a machine's function.

name: Diver's Machine Knuckledrill
description: A drill weapon.

name: Diverging Moon
description: A spear once wielded by the New Moon Reaper of the Lunar Reapers. Its razor-sharp point is flanked by twin crescent-shaped blades, designed so that once it pierces you, you can't pull free.

name: Divine Echoes Bow
description: An ornate bow used by the self-proclaimed "Masked Liberators." Flashy in appearance and formidable in performance, it draws smoothly and maintains its power even in sandstorms. Contrary to their talk of salvation, in practice it's used to raid villages and butcher people.

name: Double-Headed Axe of Greed
description: A double-edged axe specially ordered by Sizlek, the Insatiable. Though crafted to be light enough for one-handed use, it is more than capable of delivering a fatal attack. It vanished during transit.

name: Double-Sided Banner Pike
description: A double-sided banner pike with no pattern on either side. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Drakhan Hammer
description: A heavy-looking hammer. Its well-balanced design is optimized for striking. A powerful swing can crush even armor.

name: Dueling Rapier
description: A standard dueling rapier of Demeniss. No matter how much one clings to formality and wields a graceful blade, the truth remains: In the end, it is strength that claims what it desires.

name: Earthsplitter
description: Stonewalker Antiquum's greataxe. Intricate, mysterious patterns are finely etched into its sharp blade. Legend tells that Antiquum brandished this weapon before becoming a walker; with every swing, the earth trembled and continents split.

name: Eastern Witch's Fan
description: A fan engraved with mysterious patterns, received from the witch of the east. When wielded as a weapon, it allows the user to borrow the witches' power to command a harmony of wind and lightning. With gusts strong enough to push even rain clouds away, it is capable of clearing overcast skies to load a bright, sunny day.

name: Electro-Mecha Longsword
description: An electricity-charged longsword used by Marni's Machina Knight. Rather than a standard longsword, Marni fitted it with a special device to make the blade conduct electricity. Anyone struck by it suffers not only the blade's damage, but the shock from the electricity as well.

name: Electro-Mecha Spear
description: An electricity-charged spear used by Marni's Machina Knight. Rather than a standard spear, Marni fitted it with a special device to make the blade conduct electricity. Anyone struck by it suffers not only the spear's damage, but the shock from the electricity as well. A brief recharge time is required after an attack.

name: Electromagnetic Boltspitter
description: A spitter that can fire lightning through electromagnetic pulses. It shocks enemies with electricity to deal damage, and if they keep getting electrocuted, they can even burn to death in the electric blaze.

name: Electromagnetic Flamespitter
description: A spitter that can fire flames using electromagnetic currents. It sears enemies with fire, leaving burns and setting them alight.

name: Electromagnetic Frostspitter
description: A spitter that can fire frost using electromagnetic currents. It freezes enemies in place, and those that are completely frozen sometimes shatter into pieces.

name: Elemore Rapier
description: A rapier crafted by House Elemore. Of all Demeniss's noble families, Elemore's wealth, reputation, and influence shine brightest, so it's no wonder they are often envied.

name: Elenore Rapier
description: A poorly made rapier imitating House Elemore's weapons. Worthless in battle, it's bought by impoverished nobles for appearances, revealing Demenissian society's obsession with vanity.

name: Elite Vanguard
description: A charging lance used by the elite cavalry of the Wells Estate. Its long, slender tip is honed to slip into the seams of armor, while the petal-shaped metal leg base spreads the impact of a hit, protecting the rider's wrist and the lance's shaft.

name: Entwined Red Thread Hammer
description: A Pailunese hammer woven with red threads for good fortune and prayers for a warrior's safe return. As long as fate's thread endures, even lost warriors find their way home.

name: Falconne Pistol
description: A pistol manufactured in Demeniss for international export. Upon closer inspection, the finish is somewhat crude for ceremonial use. Its performance is not particularly outstanding, but it may appear as a strange and fearsome weapon to those encountering firearms for the first time.

name: Fallen Kingdom's Rapier
description: A rapier inspired by the story of a fallen kingdom. "What winter stole long ago cannot be reclaimed. Now, I beg you, find rest with those who awaited your return."

name: Fallen Kingdom's Sword
description: A sword inspired by the story of a fallen kingdom. "The last prince lost his people, his gold, and finally his reason, all claimed by endless snow."

name: Fallen Noble's Rapier
description: A rapier favored by the upper class. While the social circles of Demeniss have always been rife with intrigue, a recent event at the royal castle led to the downfall of many prestigious families. As a result, a large number of high-quality, ownerless rapiers have flooded the market.

name: Fan-Blade Greataxe
description: A greataxe made hastily in Pailune. Its appearance is somewhat rough, but the blade is well balanced. It reflects the traits of Pailunese folk, who wield axes as part of daily life.

name: Fated Shadow
description: Goyen's Sword. Traces of time it endured can be seen all over, yet its edge is honed sharper than any other blade. Some things only grow tougher the more they're worn. Enlightenment will begin where the swords of past and present cross.

name: Finest Rhinard Cannon
description: An improved model of the Rhinard Cannon, modified and newly painted. The dark red appearance and overwhelming firepower leave a strong impression. By using components that withstand higher temperatures and shocks, it possesses immense destructive power, turning enemies into dust in an instant.

name: Flame Spear
description: A spear that spits fire. Designed by an engineer inspired by fire-breathing dragons. Not merely a weapon for stabbing a single foe, but forged to face many at once. Fitted with a fuel tank, it can be used longer than the blazing spear.

name: Freesword Halberd
description: A halberd commonly used by wandering freeswords. With its broad, long axe blade and a beast-claw-like hook on the back, it can handle a range of situations. Even among the freeswords, opinions differ on which animal the axe blade's pattern is meant to depict.

name: Frostfang
description: A spear once wielded by Gwen Kraber, second-in-command of the Wolf Trackers. Its tip is long and straight, like the fang of a beast. With a steady grip, she would drive it home, freezing the very blood and breath of her prey.

name: Frozen Anguish
description: A longsword once wielded by the Skull Knight. Its cold blue blade radiates a chilling frost. A symbol of darkness and death, this longsword instills fear and intimidation, granting the power to deal devastating blows to the enemy.

name: Frozen Soul
description: A mace used by followers of the Skull Knight. It is said that whenever they swing it down, an aura of darkness lingers in the air.

name: Furious Waves Gauntlet
description: Sir Catfish's weapon of choice.

name: Gamma Barrel Cannon
description: A cannon with a simple appearance but tremendous firepower. Forged by the Ironflame Orcs under their own name, its performance is beyond doubt. Gorthak seems intent on pushing it as a major export, having it loaded onto a sky galleon.

name: Gilliam Axe
description: Its sturdy design boasts a level of practicality that sets it apart from Lambert's ostentatious axe. For warriors seeking reliable a weapon, Gilliam's Axe is a far better fit than Lambert's superficial offering.

name: Gilliam Halberd
description: A halberd crafted by House Gilliam. It is said to have been rushed out to muscle into a supply contract once monopolized by House Lambert. The quality is merely serviceable, and rumors claim the saved costs were used to pay bribes.

name: Gilliam Rapier
description: A dueling rapier of House Gilliam. The feud between Gilliam and Lambert runs so deep that few remember what sparked it in the first place.

name: Glenmore Sword
description: A mass-produced sword crafted by House Glenmore of Hernand. It features a uniquely curved handguard, a design inspired by the warped blade of a sword once cherished by the previous head of the Glenmore family.

name: Goblin King's Treasure Dagger
description: One of a goblin's collectibles. It is said to be the most prized possession of the one who amassed all the world's treasures. Legend has it that an eerie whisper of greed clings to anyone who holds it.

name: Golden Dragon's Claw
description: A greathammer shaped like a dragon's claw. Depending on the situation, its sharp back edge can also be used to strike like a pick. Scrap collectors who lingered near Marni's Masterium found parts that seemed to belong to something larger, and when pieced together, they formed the shape of a massive claw.

name: Golden Fire
description: A blaster utilizing components from the Golden Star. This weapon was once part of the ultimate weapon, modeled after a dragon soaring through the heavens. It boasts a level of sophistication that remains unparalleled by any other human creation.

name: Golden Greathammer
description: A shiny greathammer that can deliver powerful destruction. Crafted entirely with gold from head to handle, its ring-shaped ornament at the center of the hammerhead adds unique beauty.

name: Golden Sword
description: A sword made of gold. Easily mistaken for a decorative piece, it is still fully usable as a weapon.

name: Golden Vanguard
description: A halberd once used by Gregor, the Halberd of Carnage. With a long crimson shaft, a gilded blade, and an extended spear point, it can strike down foes in any situation. There could be no better weapon for Gregor, who had seen countless battles.

name: Golden-Knotted Ancestral Bow
description: A bow steeped in Pailune's culture. In some regions of Pailune, a golden knot is added each time the bow is passed down, marking how many ancestors have wielded it.

name: Gorthak Greataxe
description: A greataxe crafted at Gorthak Ironworks. Even the haft is made of metal, making it hard to swing without serious strength. The orcs at the Gorthak are far from barbaric, but some things become much simpler to settle with a massive axe.

name: Gorthak Warhammer
description: A warhammer crafted at the Gorthak Ironworks. With exceptional iron from the Krall Foundry and masterful craftsmanship, the Gorthak Ironworks has earned an unrivaled reputation. No matter the threat, the orcs will not easily surrender the ironworks they built with their own blood and sweat.

name: Grace Rapier
description: A mass-produced rapier by House Grace. Lady Grace, once its wielder, vanished like many other women who were close to the count. As for why, people can only whisper cautious guesses.

name: Grasping Moon
description: A spear once wielded by the Half Moon Reaper of the Lunar Reapers. Instead of a typical spearhead, it bears a massive half-moon blade, making it better suited to slashing and sweeping strikes than stabbing.

name: Greathammer of Fire
description: A greathammer with a red handle and a peculiar head. Its design allows it to fill the head with gunpowder to make it spit flames when it's swung.

name: Grey Wolf Bow
description: A bow fit for the tough warriors of the north. The wolf that ran with men longed to become human. Instead of tearing with a beast's fangs, it drew a bowstring steeped in conviction, fighting to protect the place it belongs.

name: Grey Wolf's Sword
description: A blade fit for the tough warriors of the north. The wolf that ran with men longed to become human. Trading tooth and nail for a sword of faith, it stands as a guardian of its kin, fighting for the home it chose.

name: Guidance of Dark Pursuit
description: A staff wielded by Antumbra's Staff, one of Antumbra's three great deacons. Antumbra's Staff tracks the traces left by Umbra's power, serving as a guide for those who follow the darkness. To the fools who reject this guidance, it delivers eternal despair.

name: Gustav Musket
description: A musket modified to enhance performance. For reasons unknown, Grand General Bastier was lukewarm about apprehending the deserters, and thus the Dusksongs were born. With Samara's gunshot as a signal, the bandits unleashed an attack as disciplined as during their days as soldiers.

name: Hellhounds Chopping Axe
description: A greataxe forged by Fundamentalist Goblins. Though the roughly hewn blade has split, they've lashed it together with rope to continue using it. It was meant to dispose of disobedient hounds, but they don't hesitate to swing it at people as well.

name: Helms Greathammer
description: A wooden greathammer crafted by the Helms. Made from dense, tough wood, it's exceptionally durable. Plenty of bandits roam the desert, but the Helms' notoriety and coordination stand above the rest. The hammer's superb quality speaks to their skill.

name: Helms Musket
description: A musket crafted by the Helms, who kidnapped engineers to make it for them. They use technology as a weapon, and their Desert Marauder shows how effective this strategy is.

name: Hernandian Contribution Banner
description: A ceremonial banner engraved with the crest of Hernand. The banner is woven onto the end of a long, sturdy pike. Only those who have contributed to Hernand are permitted to possess it.

name: Hollow Visage
description: A sword once used by the Reed Devil. The people of Sunset Valley tell a legend of a demon who stained the reed fields with blood, but how much of the tale is true is hard to know.

name: Horseshoe-Blade Greataxe
description: A greataxe named for its blade, shaped like two horseshoes joined together. Built to use as little iron as possible, it's less "simple" than it is economical.

name: Hound
description: A longsword once used by Hemon Beindel. The middle of the blade is fitted with a distinctive ornament shaped like a hound's claw. It's said to leave wounds as if you'd been savaged by a hound.

name: Hwando
description: A longsword that appears to have been crafted in a foreign eastern land, far from the continent of Pywel. Its tip narrows to a keen point, and it seems designed for cutting.

name: Hyde Crossbow
description: A crossbow built for durability and reliability. Exceptionally durable and unlikely to malfunction, it delivers steady performance even in harsh battlefield conditions. Its versatility makes it a fine choice as a main weapon in a wide range of combat situations.

name: Ignir
description: The longsword once wielded by Duane.   Its thin, razor-sharp blade slices cleanly through enemies. Forged in the volcanic region of Silver Wolf Mountain, this exceptional weapon has led Duane to victory in countless battles. He believes it will protect his comrades just as it has protected him.

name: Incomplete Masterpiece
description: A greataxe that made the name of the extraordinary blacksmith, Sydmon. It is crafted with intricate patterns and with the wielder's movements in mind. If it had been Sydmon's hand that finished sharpening it, the axe would have become not just a masterpiece but a legend.

name: Inquisitor's Greataxe
description: A greataxe issued to soldiers of the Righteous Inquisitors. It is noticeable for its patterned jet-black blade. Seeing the Inquisitors' trolls swing such a heavy weapon with ease is enough to terrify the locals.

name: Inquisitor's Rapier
description: A rapier issued to newly appointed Inquisitors. Within the Righteous Inquisitors, ascending to the high ranks requires loyalty to Bastier rather than a sense of justice. For some, this blade is not a badge of honor, but a mark of shame.

name: Invisible Longsword
description: An invisible longsword.

name: Iris Greataxe
description: A greataxe bearing the name of an old Demenissian house. "The guilt of failing to protect his lord ate away at the knight. In the end, he left this world behind."

name: Iris Halberd
description: A halberd bearing the name of an old Demenissian house. "People would gaze at the iris flower and quietly whisper that even in death, the knight protects his lord."

name: Iris Longsword
description: A longsword bearing the name of the old Demenissian house. "Yet, on the day of a most brutal battle, the knight returned home cradling his lord's lifeless body."

name: Iris Mace
description: A mace bearing the name of an old Demenissian house. "There is a tale of a loyal knight from House Iris, now vanished into the mists of history."

name: Iris Warhammer
description: A warhammer bearing the name of an old Demenissian house. "When the knight was laid to rest beside his liege, loyalty that surpassed even death made irises bloom instead of weeds."

name: Iron Fists Gauntlet
description: A fist weapon (R).

name: Jemel Pistol
description: A pistol crafted with ease of use as the top priority. Around the time firearms began to be distributed in earnest in Demeniss, the idea spread among some people that they should have at least one pistol to protect themselves. This one was the most recommended to beginners looking for their first gun at that time.

name: Kadel Mace
description: A practical mace made at a workshop in Demeniss. Its bud-shaped iron head delivers powerful impact to a single point, and the leather-wrapped grip prevents slipping even on long marches.

name: King's Dagger
description: A ceremonial dagger engraved with the royal crest. Worn at the waist, it serves as a symbol of authority, but once drawn, it becomes an exceptionally fine weapon.

name: Knightlord's Sword
description: A treasured sword with an intricate pattern engraved on its blade. It is the weapon of a legendary hero who fought to protect the smiles of many. Though it was once inseparable from its matching scabbard, the sheath's whereabouts are now unknown. It may look like a decorative piece, but it remains surprisingly sharp.

name: Kordaav Mace
description: A mace forged at Gorthak Ironworks. Crafted by melting recyled iron and reforging it with orcish smithing skill, this weapon boasts a simple, practical design and exceptional steel quality.

name: Kuku Bismuth Spear
description: A bismuth spear reinforced with a kuku spear. By using the iron pot to condense bismuth ores to their absolute limit, every swing of the spear causes newly formed resolutions to burst forth in all directions. It also retains its ability to petrify enemies, slowing them down as if they were turned to stone.

name: Kuku Boltspitter
description: An electromagnetic boltspitter reinforced with materials from a kuku pack. The Core of Deliverance housed within the cauldron generates a constant, powerful electric current. When fired, it unleashes thick bolts of lightning, electrocuting any foolish enemies in its path.

name: Kuku Disruptor Spear
description: A disruptor spear reinforced with a kuku spear. The original disruptor spear was limited by its own internal mechanisms, which necessitated a cap on its power output. However, the kuku pot, forged with Abyss technology, removes these constraints, allowing the weapon to freely unleash waves that disrupt mechanical operations.

name: Kuku Flame Spear
description: A flame spear reinforced with a kuku spear. Its iron pot is packed with high-concentration fuel, unleashing a wave of all-consuming fire with every swing. Though persistent overheating issues prevent it from spewing flames indefinitely, it remains a weapon of formidable power.

name: Kuku Flamespitter
description: An electromagnetic flamespitter reinforced with a kuku pack. Powered by the Core of Renunciation, it generates an endless stream of fire within its internal cauldron. No complex operation is required, simply pulling the handle unleashes a torrent of flames that turns everything ahead into a blazing inferno.

name: Kuku Frostspitter
description: An electromagnetic frostspitter enhanced with materials from the kuku pack. The Core of Revelation absorbs warmth, keeping the cauldron's interior near absolute zero. The cold emitted from the nozzle freezes everything in an instant, and enemies trapped in ice often shatter on the spot.

name: Kuku Laser Cannon Spear
description: A laser cannon spear reinforced with a kuku spear. It functions less like a spear and more like a portable cannon that fires explosive beams. Power amplified within the pot erupts from the tip as a streak of light, piercing through any enemies in its path.

name: Kuku Lightning Spear
description: A lightning spear reinforced with a kuku spear. By harnessing the raw power of a raging storm, its output has been pushed to the absolute limit. Each thrust releases a burst of blue flashes and lightning, paralyzing foes and reducing them to charred remains.

name: Kuku Propeller Spear
description: A propeller spear reinforced with a kuku spear. Rather than acting as a simple power source, the iron pot's internal machinery generates and traps an artificial typhoon. Upon activation, a compressed gust erupts, blowing enemies away.

name: Kuku Spear
description: A kuku pot fashioned into a weapon. Though its form has changed, it retains its original function of housing various objects and power. Its modular design allows for further modification, enabling the creation of weapons with entirely different properties depending on the components and power source used.

name: Kylus Axe
description: An axe named after the legend of Kylus. According to the old tales, he descended from the heavens to mark the land where Pailune would rise. Ancestors then bestowed their sacred blessing upon it.

name: Kylus Bow
description: A bow named after the legend of Kylus. Whether Kylus was real is debated, but many skilled marksmen, rivaling Kylus' marksmanship, are from Pailune.

name: Kylus Dagger
description: A dagger named after the legend of Kylus. According to the old tales, Kylus expanded his lands without rest. The ancestors passed their tireless diligence to Pailune.

name: Kylus Greataxe
description: A greataxe named after the legend of Kylus. According to the old tales, Kylus grew stronger by eating a shining stone. The strength of the people of Pailune is inherited from ancestors like him.

name: Kylus Spear
description: A spear named after the legend of Kylus. According to the old tales, Kylus stood fearless against an army of a thousand. The bravery of the people of Pailune is said to be inherited from ancestors like him.

name: Lambert Axe
description: Its luxurious ornamentation boasts a distinct aesthetic sense, setting it apart from Gilliam's rugged axe. For the noble warrior looking to flaunt a refined style, Lambert's Axe is a far better fit than the simple Gilliam's.

name: Lambert Halberd
description: A halberd crafted by House Lambert. It was commissioned under orders to surpass the halberds of their arch-rivals, House Gilliam. While the craftsmanship is objectively superior, it has faced cynical public reception for offering no significant difference in actual performance as a weapon.

name: Lambert Rapier
description: A dueling rapier of House Lambert. The feud between Gilliam and Lambert runs so deep that few remember what sparked it in the first place.

name: Lanford Axe
description: An axe forged by House Lanford of Calphade. This weapon is a testament to the strength of Calphadean steel. House Lanford's loyalty to Hernand is said to be as unyielding as their steel.

name: Lanford Greathammer
description: A greathammer forged by House Lanford of Calphade. The iron ball-like attachment allows all of its power to focus into a single point. Only few of Calphade's finest can wield a weapon of this weight with ease. Soldiers bet on how many times it can be swung in a row.

name: Lanford Hammer
description: A hammer crafted by House Lanford of Calphade. House Lanford has a tradition of awarding these hammer to soldiers who distinguish themselves in battle. While their strict standards remain unchanged, the number of mallets has grown as more soldiers have risen to meet them.

name: Lanford Mace
description: A mace forged by House Lanford of Calphade. Its superb quality is sought by those beyond Calphade. As seen in Lanford's armaments, Calphade is known for masterful mace craftsmanship.

name: Laser Cannon Spear
description: A spear built to fire lasers. Fitted with a light-amplifying device, it can shoot a laser in a straight line. It can deal deadly wounds from afar to enemies who approach, thinking it's just an ordinary spear. A brief recharge time is required after an attack.

name: Legionary's Gladius
description: A sword once used by the ancient warriors. Though it appears to have been mass-produced, it remains remarkably sturdy and powerful to this day.

name: Leofric Double-Headed Axe
description: An axe crafted for outpost commanders. It was intended as a symbol of glory for officers who distinguished themselves in combat. However, as internal chaos brought Demeniss's war of conquest to a halt, it remained an ill-fated weapon that never saw actual use.

name: Leofric Musket
description: A musket crafted for the high-ranking officers of an outpost. Demeniss makes no real effort to hide its ambition to one day expand its influence into the northern desert.

name: Leonne Rapier
description: A rapier said to have been wielded by a renowned duelist. After Leonne announced her retirement, her rapier found its way into the black market. However, as merchants began flooding the market with counterfeits, the original became impossible to identify.

name: Liberre Rapier
description: A rapier distinguished by its moonlike design. The crescent ornament where the hilt meets the blade is said to have been made for the sword's first owner, Liberre, the Moon Swordfighter.

name: Lightning Greathammer
description: A greathammer crackling with powerful electricity. A battery is fitted inside the hammerhead, sending electricity through it. It can strongly draw in the current in the air and strike down like lightning.

name: Lightning Spear
description: A lightning spear crafted in Delesyia. Electricity runs along the tip, shocking anyone it pierces.

name: Lightningblade of Greed
description: A masterpiece painstakingly crafted by Sizlek, the Insatiable. Fundamentalist Goblins making dangerous inventions is nothing new, but this sword was designed to channel recklessly powerful currents through its blade. It could be wielded without fear only because a lust for power overcame even terror itself.

name: Lusec Greatsword
description: A folding greatsword made by House Spencer. It's an experimental piece intended to create a weapon that is easy to carry yet devastatingly powerful. Built with a special mechanism, the blade can be folded for carrying when not in use.

name: Mace of Ambition
description: A mace once wielded by Lucian Bastier, grand general of the Kingdom of Demeniss. Its head bears the royal crest, and its sharp spikes are as splendid and cruel as his ambition.

name: Mace of Betrayal
description: The mace of Cassius Morten, the traitor. Only he himself knows if he truly believed in Bastier's ideals. He was still a coward who stained his mace with the blood of his people.

name: Mace of Resolve
description: A mace once held by the Marquis of Calphade on the border front. Its blackened head and red cloth embody the resolve of House Lanford, known as the Unyielding Shields. Every swing lands with a heavy ring, like a vow to never fall back.

name: Mace of the Fleeting
description: A mace wielded by the earthen soldiers of Hexe Sanctuary. When the jar shatters, the sound is like a scream. Perhaps it is the wailing of tormented souls, fleeing at last to freedom.

name: Maeve Axe
description: A crude yet destructive axe. Its lightweight design makes it easy to swing and highly effective at shattering enemy defenses.

name: Marauder's Halberd
description: A crude halberd wielded by Desert Marauders. Never meant to last, they deliberately leave it uncleaned even when it rusts or cakes with blood, making it all the more unsettling to see.

name: Marching Baton
description: A baton sacrificed to a whim. Though this marching baton was crafted for Marni, the eccentric man began tinkering with it himself, claiming the center of gravity was off. He lost interest the moment the work was finished, and its whereabouts have been a mystery ever since.

name: Marni Devotee's Mace
description: A heavy club engraved with an ornate pattern. Its exquisite balance makes it remarkably easy to wield. It is said that a blacksmith with no knowledge of engineering poured his passion into this weapon to prove his service to Marni.

name: Marni Musket
description: A musket that embodies the engineering of Marni, the genius engineer. It is the pinnacle of technology, operating with precisely enhanced parts. It is said to be the result of researching existing firearms and crafting them while conceptualizing a gun capable of reloading and shooting automatically.

name: Marni Tank Blaster
description: A blaster that was originally mounted on a siege engine. It has been modified to fire without any external power source. Built with zero concern for weight, it boasts overwhelming durability.

name: Mechanical Clockwork Blaster
description: A blaster modified from a Thunder Tank's lightning cannon. Crafted from the remnants of Marni's combat machines, it fires an explosive electric current.

name: Medium Black Bears Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Black Bears' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Bleed Bandits Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Bleed Bandits' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Blinding Arrows Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Blinding Arrows' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Caliburn's Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing Caliburn's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Calphadean Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing Calphade's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Delesyian Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Republic of Delesyia's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Demenissian Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Kingdom of Demeniss's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Demenissian Noble's Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing a Demenissian noble's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Dewhaven Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Ironwheel of Dewhaven's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Dusksongs Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Dusksongs' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Faceless Banner Pike
description: A small banner pike bearing the Faceless' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Flame Knights Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Flame Knights' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Greymane Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Greymane's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Halberd of Carnage's Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Gregor, the Halberd of Carnage's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Heavy Silence Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Heavy Silence's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Hellhounds Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Hellhounds' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Hernandian Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Duchy of Hernand's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Ironflame Orcs Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Ironflame Orc Clan's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Marni Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Marni's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Musket of Demeniss Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Musket of Demeniss' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Pailunese Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Tribal State of Pailune's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Staglord Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Staglord's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Tommaso Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing Tommaso's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Twilight Messengers Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Twilight Messengers' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Varnian Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Varnia's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Vellua Pirate Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Vellua Pirate's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Wells Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing House Wells' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Medium Wyvernflames Banner Pike
description: A medium banner pike bearing the Wyvernflames' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Melted Ambition
description: Myurdin, the Black Bear's sword. It gives off a searing heat, like gripping a blade fresh from the forge.

name: Metilbahm Shotgun
description: A heavy shotgun fitted with a huge, rough axe. It was designed for the Calphade warriors who charge headlong through enemy lines. Its sheer size makes it most effective at intimidating the enemy.

name: Mining Knuckledrill
description: A revolutionary mining tool. It enables mining at speeds that far outclass the traditional pickaxe. Not content with mere efficiency, the inventors pushed further, integrating an auto-collect feature that collects ores the instant they're mined.

name: Mortimer Shotgun
description: A Calphade shotgun designed for mass production. After the Calphade Gunpowder Mill was established, the Unyielding Shields began producing gunpowder weapons in earnest and training soldiers to use them. Though their craftsmanship has yet to match Demeniss, the soldiers' fighting spirit and discipline more than make up the difference.

name: Muskan's Lower Body Clone
description: A fist weapon (R).

name: Muskan's Upper Body Clone
description: A fist weapon (R).

name: Nazk Sword
description: A sword of a warrior who slew a legendary dragon. Its flashing edge seems capable of cutting through anything, and it boasts durability enough to endure a dragon's flames. To some, it is a wondrous symbol of historic achievement, to others, merely a tool that slew a noble being in pursuit of tainted fame.

name: Noble Man's Bow
description: A composite bow crafted in the eastern tradition, with layered construction that creates powerful tension. It is said to have been brought to Pailune long ago, passing through the hands of numerous heroes and great leaders, including Jian.

name: North Wind Trident
description: A spear once used by the warriors of Odeck. Odeck's north wind is said to blow thrice. First, to drive the warriors to battle; next, to carry the stench of blood; and finally, to blow the fallen's remains away on the wind.

name: Oblivion of the Past
description: A blunt weapon once used by the Masked Liberator. It looks like something meant for ritual use, but no such power can be felt. The Faceless believe that any who are struck by this staff are stripped of their memory and are granted salvation.

name: Octarr's Legacy
description: A club designed by the orc artisan Octarr. Although the great blacksmith was never a warrior, it is said he took up the weapon himself to stand against injustice. Today, however, few who wield this club remember the convictions he held.

name: Odeck Wooden Club Mace
description: A mace crafted solely with timber from Odeck. Odeck is surrounded by nature and has plenty of resources from its rich forests. Though wooden, it rivals even the finest steel weapons.

name: Orc Blaster
description: A blaster that embodies the pinnacle of the orc's steelcraft. Rough-hewn, but it is built for performance.

name: Ordinary Gloves
description: Leather gloves worn by the Greymanes. The backs are heavily reinforced and the palms are finished with a rough texture to ensure a firm grip for armed combat. In an emergency, the thick padding allows for unarmed combat even without a weapon.

name: Pailunese Contribution Banner Pike
description: A ceremonial banner crafted by the artisans of Pailune. A long, sturdy pole is adorned at its tip with a banner bearing the emblem that symbolizes Pailune. Only those who have contributed to Pailune are permitted to possess it.

name: Pailunese Logging Axe
description: A greataxe used for logging in Pailune. It looks a bit too brutal for mere wood, but it was made that way as no one knows whether a logging trip in Pailune will end with timbers, wild bears, or ambushing bandits.

name: Pailunese Musket
description: A musket made in Pailune. Parts and blueprints were brought in from Demeniss, but the weapon was built entirely by northern hands. Jian also took great interest in adopting outside technology, and the people of Pailune trusted him despite their wariness toward outsiders.

name: Pailunese Riteblade
description: In the harsh North, survival demands strength. Though Pailune is more civilized now, giving a weapon to coming-of-age children remains as a tradition.

name: Pailunese Shotgun
description: A shotgun made in Pailune. Parts and blueprints were brought in from Demeniss, but the weapon was built entirely by northern hands. Jian also took great interest in adopting outside technology, and the people of Pailune trusted him despite their wariness toward outsiders.

name: Parashu Axe
description: An easy-to-handle axe. It was crafted to serve as a weapon, free of unnecessary ornamentation. A trend that started among northern warriors, it has since spread across the entire continent.

name: Parvel Greatsword
description: A folding greatsword made by House Spencer. The house was known for its eccentrics—rather than merely adopting Delesyian technology, it sought to reinterpret it in Demeniss's own way. Built with a special mechanism, the blade can be folded for carrying when not in use.

name: Patterned Stone Greataxe
description: A giant greataxe made from a boulder carved with ancestral symbols. Perhaps the wisdom of the ancient forebears who made this axe wasn't much more complicated than "the bigger the weapon, the better."

name: Peltree Sword
description: A desert sword of uncertain origin. Sometimes found buried in sand, it is restored by skilled smiths into a weapon still fit for use today. Some scholars claim it is evidence of a vanished ancient civilization of the Crimson Desert.

name: Propeller Spear
description: A wind spear that unleashes powerful gusts. The thruster at the tip rapidly compresses the surrounding air, blasting out a fierce wind when striking an enemy.

name: Rapier of Amity
description: A Demeniss weapon in Pailunese style, once gifted to bridge the divide between Pailune and the Kingdom of Demeniss. The Pailunese scoffed, claiming it looked more suited for sewing than for war.

name: Reckoning
description: A massive spear once wielded by Titan, the God of Lightning. Though its lightning power faded when it left its original owner's hands, the spearhead, shaped like a bolt striking down, remains as sharp as ever.

name: Red Needle
description: A sword forged from unknown material. Crafted with ancient skills now forgotten, this weapon is lighter than a standard sword. However, grappling its center of gravity is tricky, making it difficult to handle for anyone without mastery as a swordsman.

name: Red Rage
description: Ludvig's sword. Crafted for dual-wielding, it is relatively lightweight. Given the owner's notoriety, steeped in blood and betrayal, the weapon's appearance is surprisingly modest.

name: Reinforced Steel Blaster
description: A standard-issue steel blaster with enhanced firepower. It was developed after the need for a highly mobile heavy firearm became clear in war, but it's said to be too heavy and unwieldy for just anyone to use.

name: Reventine Priest's Spear
description: A spear used by the priests of Reventine Monastery. Just below the tip hangs an ornament bearing Solumena's symbol, which indicates it was crafted so the monastery can stand ready to fight against any threat at any time.

name: Rhett's Longsword
description: Forged by Rhett of Hernand. This longsword was crafted as repayment to Marquis Serkis, who saved him from the Bleed Bandits. Now, It's the most representative weapon of Hernand.

name: Rhias's Axe
description: An axe commissioned by Rhias, old master of Hernand, to defend his homeland. His resolve still lingers in the weapon.

name: Rhinard Cannon
description: A weapon that reinterprets the design of a traditional cannon with a modern sensibility. Defined by its clean, refined finish, it boasts firepower to match. It has been improved to shed the clunkiness of older ordnance and maximize real-world performance.

name: Righteous Verdict
description: A longsword once wielded by Gabriel Caliburn. Boasting exceptional strength and sharpness, it relentlessly judges all who stand in its way. He swung this blade to guide Pywel toward what he believed was the rightful path, beginning with Demeniss.

name: Ring of the Earth
description: An axe that looks more like an instrument for rituals than a weapon. Strange moss clings inside its ring, resisting all scrubbing. Beneath it are traces left by necks once hung from the ring.

name: Roar of the Black Bear
description: A warhammer once wielded by the Black Bear captain. Its head is shaped the same on both sides so it can be swung either way, and each blow hits with enough force to make the ground tremble.

name: Rogue's Mace
description: A crude, roughly crafted mace. Designed solely for killing, it is devoid of any artistry. It evokes the chilling sensation that the scent of its victims' blood still clings to it.

name: Rosemond Pistol
description: A cheaply made, low end pistol. As Demeniss's gunsmithing advanced, more affordable firearms began to appear on the market. Of course, not much can be expected of its performance.

name: Royal Oath
description: A rapier used in the coronation ceremonies of House of Thorel. Once a symbol of Demeniss's prosperity and royal legitimacy, it is now a faded relic that serves only as a reminder of past glory.

name: Rune-Engraved Rock
description: A greathammer with rune engravings. It is made using a rough rock from a quarry, and is empowered by the power the runes hold.

name: Saltroad Mace
description: A mace crafted by desert merchants. Safely traversing the lawless regions of the Crimson Desert is the ultimate trial for any merchant. The merchants of the Saltroad Trading Post forged this weapon to defend themselves against marauders.

name: Saltroad Warhammer
description: A warhammer made at the Saltroad Trading Post. For those bound for Varnia, the Saltroad Trading Post is the last chance to hire freeswords and arm themselves. Beyond its borders, a grueling journey awaits.

name: Sanguine Knell
description: A blunt weapon once wielded by Mazzul, the Dark Justiciar. This uniquely shaped warhammer is adorned with several small bells that emit an eerie chime with every swing.

name: Savage Longsword
description: A uniquely shaped longsword with no guard and a half-moon blade tip. It symbolizes the strength and instincts of beasts, unleashing violent and primal power.

name: Savage Sawblade
description: A sword once wielded by Giath. Its curved blade is lined with saw-like barbs, a cruel design that tears at flesh. It fought alongside him through countless hunts, stained with the blood of innumerable lives, beast and human alike.

name: Savage Woodland Spirit Killer
description: A club crafted by the Mistwood Hunters. It's said that using materials taken from a still-living woodland spirit produces higher-quality weapons. As if the pain from being torn away has seeped into them, the spikes are eerily sharp.

name: Serdin Greatsword
description: A folding greatsword made by House Spencer. Purged in the name of the cause, the house has had all records and history erased. Built with a special mechanism, the blade can be folded for carrying when not in use.

name: Shackle of Might
description: A sword of Fortain the Cursed Knight. He gained the power to command a clone through a contract with Hexe Marie, but the moment he lost a fight, he was beheaded by that very clone.

name: Shadow of the Past Pistol
description: A pistol used by the Masked Liberator. When she thought no one was watching, she would occasionally draw the pistol and whisper with a sorrowful voice. While it is unknown what secrets it may have heard, the only answer the pistol can offer is a gunshot that blooms death.

name: Shadowleaf Bow
description: A bow used by the Mistwood Hunters. In the dense, wooded Wayward Woods, no weapon is more lethal. It was primarily used for poaching animals and executing trespassers.

name: Shadowleaf Soul Branch
description: Some residents of Longleaf believe that when a person returns to the earth, part of their soul dwells within the woodland spirits that grow from that land. Therefore, even if a woodland spirit falls, they never carelessly use the wood left behind.

name: Shaman's Staff
description: A staff made in Tariv. Wood, closer to nature than processed iron, channels a sorcerer's power far better. Yet to most folk, it's just a sturdy stick fit for swinging and little else.

name: Sielos Longsword
description: An ornate, old-world longsword steeped in noble grace. It may be mistaken for Demenissian craftsmanship, yet a closer look reveals a style that matches no region of Pywel perfectly.

name: Sigremon Greataxe
description: A greataxe of tremendous weight, made to hew down massive foes larger than a man. The solid materials from haft to blade are so heavy that even lifting it, let alone swinging it, is a struggle without exceptional strength.

name: Silver Visione Stand
description: A hanger for visiones that seems to be usable as a spear.

name: Silverwolf Axe
description: An axe imbued with the essence of Pailune. Before Ashclaw Keep was constructed, a legendary smithy stood within the volcanic regions of Silver Wolf Mountain. Legend has it that an unnamed blacksmith cast himself into the lava to forge the ultimate axe.

name: Sior Blaster
description: A blaster that integrates the technologies of the Abyss. It is a weapon that operates on principles humanity has yet to understand. Fortunately, it can still fire even with ordinary shells.

name: Slave Gladiator Branding Spear
description: A spear fitted with a branding iron for searing a pattern into a slave gladiator's body. With slave gladiators putting up fierce resistance, the iron was mounted on a long stick so it could be pressed on from a distance.

name: Small Banner Pike
description: A small banner pike with no pattern. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

name: Small Black Bears Banner Pike
description: A small banner pike bearing the Black Bears' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

description: A small banner pike bearing the Bleed Bandits' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

description: A small banner pike bearing a Demenissian noble's symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.

description: A small banner pike bearing Musket of Demeniss' symbol. It looks like it could be used as a weapon in a pinch.
